ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Norma Ong.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that his Client had to make several requests to T Rowe Price to get the statements, that they recently received them and that the inventory was sent to the Probate Referee five days ago. Mr. McCaffrey also stated that as soon as they get the inventory and appraisal back from the Referee, they can file for distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch.. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
